Let $d$ be a positive integer and let $A$ be a $d \times d$ matrix with integer
entries. Suppose $I + A + A^2 + \dots + A^{100} = 0$ (where $I$ denotes the
identity $d \times d$ matrix, so $I$ has 1's on the main diagonal, and $0$
denotes the zero matrix, which has all entries 0). Determine the positive
integers $n \leq 100$ for which $A^n + A^{n+1} + \dots + A^{100}$ has
determinant $\pm 1$.
